name: compliance trace: /audit-pack reads compliance_state across per-commit provenance manifests and emits a Compliance Freshness section per C-10
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && printf '{"commit":"abc","compliance_state":{"soc2-tsc":{"freshness_at_generation":"fresh-within-fetch-frequency","controls_consulted":["CC8.1"]}}}' > .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --emit "$PWD/audit-pack.md" --section compliance-freshness && grep -E "Compliance Freshness" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && grep "soc2-tsc" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
